This release adds a `--version` flag to the `tracking-markers` CLI, and introduces a GitHub Actions workflow that publishes new versions to PyPI automatically when a tag is pushed.

### New

- `tracking-markers --version` (or `-v`) prints the installed version and exits.

### Maintenance

- Added `.github/workflows/publish.yml`, which on a `v*.*.*` tag push runs the test suite, builds the distribution, publishes to PyPI via [Trusted Publishing](https://docs.pypi.org/trusted-publishers/) (no PyPI tokens stored in GitHub Secrets), and creates a draft GitHub Release with the wheel and sdist attached.
- Internal refactor of the version-string helper.

**Full changelog:** https://github.com/bertoldi-collab/tracking-markers/compare/v0.10.0...v0.11.0

Enjoy! :octocat:
